title: melampyrum sylvaticum subsp. intermedium
intro: Melampyrum sylvaticum subsp. intermedium, commonly known as yellow archangel, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Melampyrum sylvaticum subsp. intermedium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or teas, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive problems.
